name: Don't Be Scared - Episode 1: The Lost Soul
short_description: A psychological horror game based on exploration and Storytelling. Complete your work, play minigames and stay alive. Discover all the secrets of this condominium and why there are few residents.
detailed_description:
Don't be scared - Episode 1: The lost soul is the first game in a series to come, telling some stories involving the supernatural and strong themes. The protagonist is a plumber who was assigned to work in a condominium. In the middle of work, the protagonist will experience things he has never seen before, leaving him intrigued by what could be happening, whether it is stress due to work or whether it really is something from another world.
Do your job, fix pipes, interact with villagers, complete minigames and most importantly, stay alive.
